reason: Check global source-of-truth and RVV stage/authority compliance.
Check selected-boundary-only segment2 load/store behavior, provider facts, target validator facts, and fail-closed diagnostics.
Check tcrv.exec remains ABI/runtime envelope only.
Check common EmitC/export remains neutral and consumes provider-built routes only.
Check runtime ABI and target artifact claims are provider-route-backed.
Check focused compiler/runtime evidence covers production behavior.
Check generated-bundle evidence, inactive/tail sentinels, and direct route-entry fail-closed evidence.

Verify load/store provider facts come from typed body/config/runtime facts.
Verify provider consumes route-control/materialization/statement facts before common EmitC.
Verify target validator consumes rebuilt provider route facts and rejects stale/missing mirrors.
Verify generated-bundle dry-runs and ssh rvv runtime correctness for both load/store counts and masks.
Verify focused target validation positive and negative tests for computed-mask segment2 load/store.
